subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! For some time now numerous letters have been received from the friends of God, but due to impediments [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان مدتی بود مدیده که از یاران الهی مکاتیب عدیده رسید ولی از موانع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @contention and conflict, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
